name: Old-Fashioned Prune Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit and mash the prunes.
2. Blend in the lemon zest, lemon juice, 2 tablespoons of sugar, and salt until well combined.
3. Gently fold the remaining sugar and beaten egg whites into the prune mixture.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-30 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Serve warm with custard sauce if desired.
